summary: The South Bay's funding momentum accelerated into April, with major rounds fueling AI and chip companies across the region—SiFive (Santa Clara) closed a $400M Series G, while Rhoda AI and Mind Robotics (both Palo Alto) each landed half-billion-dollar Series A deals. Most local tech firms are still actively hiring, though two are pulling back, as San Jose State hosts talks this week on job-market data and AI's role in legal work.
